---
title: "My Projects"
page-layout: full
description: |
  My projects are listed here. You can find more information about each project by clicking on the links below.
listing: 
  contents: projects
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, categories, description, author]
---
